name: @metorial/fathom
description: Retrieve AI-powered meeting recordings, transcripts, summaries, and action items from Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams calls. List and filter meetings by date, type, recorder, or invitee. Access speaker-labeled timestamped transcripts, AI-generated summaries in Markdown, and extracted action items with assignees and completion status. Retrieve CRM-matched contacts, companies, and deals for meetings. Manage teams and team members. Create and delete webhooks to receive notifications when new meeting content is ready.
